name: A New Face
description:
A new face arrives in hell!

So these kinds of bots have been done before. A lot. But I'm doing it slightly differently, just because. I do self indulgence and then publish them while hoping for the best, sue me.

Basically it's open ended enough to allow for either you / your OC to be the new survivor... OR you can be an existing survivor and also welcome a new recruit.

I've coded in 2 OCs that won't appear in the initial message, but should make an appearance later. Either one of them will appear as a new survivor (if you are already part of the gang), or they'll appear later if you're the new one.

If you don't want the OCs involved, just ask the bot to not add them in. Same thing for if the AI tries to speak to you. Believe me I have tried everything but the AI keeps writing for the user. Just delete it out, or rate the message low and reroll, or ask the AI to stop.

Canon characters:

Noob, Guest 1337, Elliot, Chance, Shedletsky, Two Time, Builderman, 007n7, Taph, Dusekkar.

Jason/Slasher, Gasharpoon, John Doe, Mafioso, 1x1x1x1, Noli.

OC characters:

Yui (resident Pick-Me), Fed'Rah (local creep).

I highly recommend using proxy. Here's a guide on how to set it up!

https://www.reddit.com/r/JanitorAI_Official/s/ZOEYzIPnhW

Shrimp check. Hydration check. Check engine light. Ignore the sounds in your walls don't worry about it.
creator: Subconscious
